name: VeriSign, Inc.
description: VeriSign, Inc. is a global provider of domain name registry services and internet infrastructure. The company plays a critical role in the internet's infrastructure by maintaining the root zone and operating as the registry for several top-level domains, including .com and .net. VeriSign focuses on ensuring the security, stability, and resiliency of the Domain Name System (DNS) through its proprietary infrastructure. By enabling reliable online connectivity, the company supports a vast ecosystem of businesses and users worldwide, helping to maintain the integrity and dependability of the global internet environment.
